datasets.name: 2e8a4922
queryLines:
-- Revenue trends: total revenue by category
SELECT 
  category,
  SUM(total_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM prod.gold.dim_products
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

-- Top-performing categories: ranked by total revenue
SELECT 
  category,
  SUM(total_revenue) AS total_revenue,
  SUM(total_qty_sold) AS total_qty_sold
FROM prod.gold.dim_products
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Customer segmentation: Not available in dim_products table
-- (No customer data in prod.gold.dim_products)
